subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that, through divine grace, in these spiritual days we are engaged in service to the friends of Truth - which service is accounted as rendered unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بعنایت رحمانی در این ایام روحانی بخدمت دوستان حق که خدمت او محسوب
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @chastisement and requital
